'''Tyluun''' was a gloomy [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Tyluun system/Legends|Tyluun system]] of the [[Juvex sector/Legends|Juvex sector]]. It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Night-Soarer]]s.<ref name="Atlas" />

{{Planet-stub}}
